UserProfile.title: User Profile
UserProfile.description: User account statistics, currencies, settings, and general info

purchasedItems.description: Identifiers of cosmetics purchased in shop

UserHabit.title: User Habit
UserHabit.description: Habit item tracked by the user that delivers XP and damage to threat

streak.description: Current active streak of consecutive days completed

highStreak.description: All time high steak for this habit

lastCompletedYMD.description: YYYY-MM-DD representation of the last completed date

UserThreat.title: User Threat
UserThreat.description: Details of threat/boss engaged by the user

unlocked.description: Flag representing whether threat level is unlocked

defeated.description: Flag representing if threat is defeated

xpUnlockRequirement.description: XP required to unlock this threat

UserLog.title: User Log
UserLog.description: Historical log tracking operations performed, completions, rewards, and system adjustments

type.description: Type of log: completion, purchase, system

/users/{userId}.description: User profiles collection linking directly to userId

/users/{userId}/habits/{habitId}.description: Individual habits of the authenticated user

/users/{userId}/threats/{threatId}.description: Track the user-specific integrity/defeat state of orbital threats

/users/{userId}/logs/{logId}.description: Personal chronometer logs detailing habit completion and crystal expenditure
